name: Swing 365 Golf Wichita
about: Swing 365 Golf Wichita offers a state-of-the-art golf simulator experience in a warm and inviting private club atmosphere. The facility operates on a membership-based model, providing access to individual simulators that can be booked 24/7 online. Each private suite allows golfers to enjoy a round of golf on over 95 global courses with no wait times. The venue combines the precision of advanced simulation technology with a flexible, on-demand approach to the game.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing™ simulator technology with 688 infrared sensors for precise ball flight measurement
365/24/7 access to private simulator suites with online booking convenience
Over 95 world-class courses available for play and practice
BYOB and food policy allows for a personalized and comfortable experience
Membership-based model ensures dedicated, uninterrupted playtime

food_and_drink.notes: Bring your own food is permitted
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) is permitted

simulator_hardware.notes: Widescreen simulator with 688 infrared sensors across two tracks for ball measurement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue allows you to bring your own food and beverages (BYOB).

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, typical simulator sessions range from 60-120 minutes depending on the pace of play and number of players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no specific information regarding child-friendly features or policies.
